title: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
summary: A UK parliamentary group launched an inquiry into banking restrictions on crypto firms and consumers, including their impact on investment and competition.

title: Bitcoin ETFs post 5-day inflow streak, longest since May
summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $227 million in inflows as BTC climbed above $65,000, extending their longest winning streak since early May.

title: London Stock Exchange to Introduce Nonstop Trading Next Year
summary: The London Stock Exchange will open a new venue outside of its regular market hours, a move to offer “near-continuous trading” and better compete with the 24/7 trading offered by alternative platforms.

title: Stocks Rise as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
summary: A rebound in chipmakers gathered pace on Tuesday, driving stock markets higher in an otherwise quiet session that saw modest moves in Treasury yields, oil and currencies.

title: Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
Bitcoin miner Hut 8 has said it signed a second 15-year lease ​worth $9.8 billion for its AI data center.

title: Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn
summary:

Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn 
Metaplanet subsidiary Bitcoin Japan is starting a crypto treasury.

title: UK Lawmakers Launch Inquiry Into Crypto Banking Access
summary: A cross-party group is examining why UK banks block accounts and payments for crypto firms—and whether it's holding the sector back.

title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

title: CoinShares launches UCITS platform targeting Europe’s institutional investors
summary: CoinShares is expanding into Europe's $30 trillion UCITS ecosystem with the launch of a new platform and a Bitcoin Mining ETF.

title: London Stock Exchange plans overnight venue to extend trading hours: FT
summary: London Stock Exchange plans an overnight venue as traditional exchanges extend trading hours amid competition from 24/7 crypto platforms.

title: China weighs tighter export controls on AI models and chips
summary: Beijing consults companies on ways to stop west acquiring its advanced technologies and star start-ups

title: AI is becoming a geopolitical weapon, warns EU digital chief
summary: Europe needs to avoid relying on an unpredictable Washington for strategic capabilities, says Henna Virkkunen
